properties.name: security.admin.require-non-default
properties.description: Fail startup when configured admin credentials still use known defaults.

properties.name: security.rate-limit.enabled
properties.description: Enable the custom API rate limiting filter.

properties.name: security.rate-limit.use-forwarded-headers
properties.description: Trust forwarded headers from a known reverse proxy for rate limiting and request context.

properties.name: security.rate-limit.requests-per-minute
properties.description: Maximum number of allowed API requests per minute per client.

properties.name: analytics.retention.days
properties.description: Number of days to retain page view and analytics event data before cleanup.

properties.name: security.admin.username
properties.description: Username for the protected admin endpoints.

properties.name: security.admin.password
properties.description: Password for the protected admin endpoints.

properties.name: contact.captcha.enabled
properties.description: Enable captcha validation for public contact and lead forms.

properties.name: contact.captcha.site-key
properties.description: Public site key used by the captcha widget on the frontend.

properties.name: contact.captcha.secret
properties.description: Private secret used to verify captcha tokens server-side.

properties.name: contact.captcha.verify-url
properties.description: Verification endpoint for the configured captcha provider.

properties.name: contact.notification.enabled
properties.description: Enable email notifications for new contact requests.

properties.name: contact.notification.to
properties.description: Destination email address for contact notifications.

properties.name: contact.notification.from
properties.description: From address used for outbound notification emails.

properties.name: contact.notification.subject
properties.description: Subject line for new contact notification emails.
